calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Robert Peterson, III, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Peter Kung, Shiow Mei Lee and Ti Ching Kung.
Plaintiff's Witness: Peter Kung, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony, reviewing and considering of the evidence and exhibits presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Roy Lui and Chanel Min Liu as follows:
Damages $49,260.79
Prejudgment Interest $3,375.00
Attorney Fees $2,250.00
Costs $455.00, for a total of $55,340.79
Judgment signed in open court.
